description: FGAP-035: the free-text/catalogue audit scans the deferred-gap reason field (domain_alignment *_not_addressed[].reason) the same way it scans targeted-row rationale, closing the enforcement asymmetry.
acceptance_criteria: The free-text/catalogue audit scans the deferred-gap reason field the same way it scans targeted-row rationale: a fabricated or off-register reason on a deferred-gap entry is detected; demonstrated.
A legitimate deferred-gap reason passes the audit; demonstrated.
No previously-passing check moves from passing to failing: outputs parse, the catalogue-gate raises no new rejection on existing inputs, and the project gate is green.
